CVE-2007-1267.title: Sylpheed 2.2.7 and earlier does not properly use the --status-fd  ...
CVE-2007-1267.description: Sylpheed 2.2.7 and earlier does not properly use the --status-fd argument when invoking GnuPG, which prevents Sylpheed from visually distinguishing between signed and unsigned portions of OpenPGP messages with multiple components, which allows remote attackers to forge the contents of a message without detection.

CVE-2017-17517.title: libsylph/utils.c in Sylpheed through 3.6 does not validate string ...
CVE-2017-17517.description: libsylph/utils.c in Sylpheed through 3.6 does not validate strings before launching the program specified by the BROWSER environment variable, which might allow remote attackers to conduct argument-injection attacks via a crafted URL.

CVE-2021-37746.title: textview_uri_security_check in textview.c in Claws Mail before 3. ...
CVE-2021-37746.description: textview_uri_security_check in textview.c in Claws Mail before 3.18.0, and Sylpheed through 3.7.0, does not have sufficient link checks before accepting a click.
